---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.family_map_wall_board
alias: family_map_wall_board
purchased_on: 2026-03-02
total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---
# Map wall board and pin set

```text
+----------------+----------------------------+
| field          | value                      |

| alias          | family_map_wall_board      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-02                 |
| total_eur      | 36                         |
| counterparty   | Möbelhaus Malmö AB         |
| project        | Family Map Wall            |
| related_entity | Ida Novak                  |
+----------------+----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |

```

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully. I OCR-structured all Ida-related bills listed in preflight by adding bill-schema YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree /, AGENTS.MD, context), read 99_system guidance before task work, used finance frontmatter schema exactly, processed all preflight-listed related files, preserved original body text below frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox note requested OCR for all bills related to Ida Novak. Preflight enumerated exactly 3 related finance files, and each was read then updated with required bill-schema fields (record_type, bill_id, alias, purchased_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, lines; related_entity included where visible) while keeping body content. After all three were completed, the inbox note was deleted as required by workflow.
